_comment: UTM source|medium -> exact SA 'Source' text, specific to Merrill Services. Values confirmed live against the actual SA dropdown 2026-07-08 (note: 'Google  - Organic/website' has a genuine double space baked into the SA dropdown itself - confirmed via char codes, not a typo here).

_wildcard_rules._comment: Any bare .com domain with medium=referral -> Google  - Organic/website

_fallback_fix_comment: Was "Google Organic", which is NOT a real option in this dropdown (confirmed live 2026-07-08, caused 2 errors for 'Theresa' in the June run) - changed to match the general organic bucket used for google|organic and yahoo|organic in this same file.
